text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is the process of optimizing the output of a large language model, so it references

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: an authoritative knowledge base outside of its training data sources before generating a response. Large Language Models

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (LLMs) are trained on vast volumes of data and use billions of parameters to generate original output for tasks like question

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: answering, language translation and sentence completion. RAG extends the already powerful capabilities of LLMs to specific

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: domains or an organization's internal knowledge base, all without the need to retrain the model. It is a cost-effective approach

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: to improving LLM output so it remains relevant, accurate and useful in various contexts.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. Pretrained models do not have the knowledge of current affairs. Their knowledge base

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: is limited to the training dataset.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Model's knowledge base cannot be updated without fine tuning which is time consuming

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: and expensive process. Also, fine tuning is not as solution in the cases where data base

g.text: - Chunking is the process of breaking large documents into smaller,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: manageable text segments (chunks) to improve retrieval accuracy.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - Chunking also helps to limit the amount to data input to embedder

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: or LLM model below its context size or window.
